neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchMetrics

Package
Description
neqsim.process.research
Process synthesis and candidate-ranking utilities for process research workflows.

    Adds annual operating cost metrics from energy and utility terms.

    Applies process-level penalties to the product score.
